stemHtml: A speed restriction of 120 knots is given to the pilot. What is the effect on the compulsory position reports?

options.a: It is mandatory to report your speed.
options.b: You don't have to report the speed since the time is included in the position report.
options.c: Time should be reported instead of speed.
options.d: You have to report the 120 knots restriction when changing ATC frequency.
